item.title: After a long battle with anorexia, I finally have body confidence!
item.description: Battled with eating disorders and body confidence for so long but I'm finally at a point where I feel proud! All bodies are amazing, but I feel much happier with some curve!
item.dc:creator: EmmaAndersonmcr

item.title: It can no longer tolerate this.
item.description: He has made me wait four times. Last time, I didn't eat coz I thought we would have dinner together coz he said he would cook for me but when I got home he was out with his friends and he got home drunk at 3 am. Fuck that!
item.dc:creator: myfanwy16

item.title: Images of Note: And there's Weird!
item.description:
This is one of the best scenes in the Simpsons.
Sheep are creepy yo
And you don't seem to understand.
Fun weird is better than republican weird.
yip!
if you live in Edinburgh, you know. August is "don't go into the city center" month.
Oh god
There were no transgender people competing in the olympics, so the right created them!
Fun fact, Richard Stallman campaigning for free and open source software started with a Printer.
:3
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I am 30 or 40 years old. I don't need this.
item.dc:creator: vudumommajuju

item.title: Fuck the edl
item.description: I am whiter than snow, grew up church of England in a working class family. We worked hard for what we had. No Muslim took our jobs, but white nationalists did burn down my family's shop. No Indian attacked us, but white nationalists threw bottles at me for walking with my boyfriend. No immigrant SAed us, but white nationalists did assault my little sister in a bar. Fuck this country, fuck the EDL, fuck reform UK, fuck Brexit, fuck Tommy Robinson and fuck Nigel farage.
item.dc:creator: thetinymonarch

item.title: Hi Imgur. Here are some pokemon I drew to upset people.
item.description:
Bulbasaur.
Clefairy.
Diglett.
Pikachu.
Pikachu again.
Poliwag.
Ditto.
Snorlax.
JIgglypuff.
Quagsire.
Slowpoke. Thank you for your time.

item.title: Pickpockets in Paris
item.dc:creator: whiningiseasy

item.title: Unloading dumps- I owe you guys for getting me through the crap
item.description: I know I’m blasting you guys with dumps- but every time I go through something my weird little online family has been here even though I never posted or shared, so for that THANK YOU ? truly you’ve all been a blessing you’ll never understand and hopefully my random posts will help someone else who’s scrolling to unwind. Sorry it’s mainly wwe and survivor and tv shows but I’m about to be 38 so that’s my wheelhouse. Anyway enjoy!
item.dc:creator: TheRogerMac

item.title: Time to share bottom shelf memes with my strange internet friends
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala)
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Helluva way
item.description: Text in video: "Me trying to explain that I can't sit on their face: I'm 6'3", over 200lbs and my bottom is the size of a king sized bed pillow"
